level_signals: 7+ years of experience as a Product Manager in technology companies
Leads a 110-person organization partnering with 10–20 engineers
Responsible for articulating product vision and annual/quarterly plans
Act as a leader and change agent

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 7+ years of experience as a Product Manager in technology companies.
Backend Foundation: Deep experience with large-scale backend systems and an API-first mindset.
Platform Expertise: Proven track record building platform infrastructure that serves the needs of multiple disparate stakeholders.

Communication: Ability to synthesize complex technical discussions and write succinctly for senior leadership. The ability to work cross functionally and speak multiple 'languages': you're equally credible as a thought partner for Go-to-Market, Engineering, Finance or Legal leaders.
Operational Resilience: Comfort dealing with many moving pieces and evolving legacy systems into their next generation.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience in Fintech or at a Hyperscaler Cloud Infra provider (e.g., AWS, GCP, Azure).
Experience managing technical software products from infancy to scale.
A background in designing and building multi-product platforms or complex billing systems.

scope.surface: Commerce Systems — internal revenue engine, billing, seller systems, financial data warehouses, unified control planes for monetization
scope.business_model: B2B financial infrastructure platform (internal platform product serving Stripe's own product teams and external merchants)
primary_metrics_inferred: Integration friction reduction for internal product teams
Fee transparency and reconciliation quality for merchants
core_responsibilities: Build 'control planes' that unify seller systems, user billing, and financial data warehouses to reduce integration friction for product teams
Drastically reduce time-to-market for new Stripe products by streamlining monetization workflows
Articulate the product vision for Stripe's revenue platform, developing annual and quarterly plans
Act as a leader and change agent, turning operational noise into a clear engineering roadmap
Partner with engineering leaders to design ingestion, enrichment, and serving interfaces
Act as a thought partner for GTM, Finance, and Legal

green_flags: High-scope, high-leverage role described as 'the engine room of Stripe's revenue'
Clear ownership area with a well-defined 110-person organization and 10–20 direct engineering partners
Explicitly encourages candidates without all listed experience to apply: 'Even if you don't have all the experience above we'd encourage you to apply if this role excites you'
Concrete responsibilities with measurable goals (time-to-market, friction reduction)
red_flags: Location not specified anywhere in the JD — work arrangement (remote/hybrid/onsite), cities, and visa sponsorship are all completely unclear
High minimum bar (7+ years) with no seniority level label stated (Senior PM vs Staff PM ambiguous)

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 7+ years requirement, org scale, and strategic leadership signals; 'Senior IC / Staff PM' is an inference)
scope.business_model (inferred from JD context as internal-facing platform within a B2B fintech company)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly stated in JD)
